raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mehneſi/ laid jums weenaſwech-\
ta Safauſchana irr/ nekahdu\
Kalpoſchanaſ-Darbu buhs jums\
darriht/ bet ſeptin Deenas tam\
KUNGAM Swehtkus turreht.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un jums buhs Dedsamu-\
Uppuri peeneſt par Ugguni/ tahs\
faldaſ Smarfchas tam KUN-\
GAM/ trihſpadeſmits Wehr-\
fenus no leelem Lohpeem/ diwi\
Aunus/ tſchetrpadeſmits gadſ-\
kahrtigus Jehrus/ bes Wainas\
lai tee irr.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winnu Ehdamu-Uppu-\
puri no Kweefchu-Milteem/ ar\
Etji fajaunteem/ trihs Detmitus\
pee weena Wehrſcha lihds teem\
trihſpadeſmits Wehrſcheem/diwi\
Definitus pee weena Auna ſtarp\
teem diwi Auneem.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un weenu Definitu pee\
ikweena Jehra/ lihds ar teem\
tſchetrpadeſmits Jehreem.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un weenu Ahſi par Greh-\
ku-Uppuri/ pahri pahr to nemit-\
tejamu Dedsamu-Uppuri/ win-\
na Ehdamu-Uppuri/ un winna\
Dserramu-Uppuri.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to ohtrâ Deenâ/\
diwiſpadeſmits Wehrſenus no\
leelem Lohpeem/ diwi Aunus/\
tſchetrpadeſmits gadſkahrtigus\
Jehrus/ kas bes Wainas.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winnu Ehdamu-Uppu-\
puri/ un winnu Dserramu-Uppu-\
puri pee Wehrſcheem/ pee Au-\
neem/ un pee Jehreem/ pehz win-\
na Pulku/ ka peenahkahs.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un weenu Ahſi par Greh-\
ku-Uppuri/ pahri pahr to nemit-\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tejamu Dedsamu-Uppuri/ un\
winna Ehdamo-Uppuri/ar win-\
na Dserramo-Uppureem.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un treſchâ Deenâ ween-\
padeſmits Wehrſhus/ diwi Au-\
nus tſchetrpadeſmits gadſkahr-\
tigus Jehrus/ kas bes Wai-\
nas.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winno Ehdamo-Uppu-\
rus/ un winno Dserramo-Up-\
pus/ pee Wehrſcheem/ pee Au-\
neem/ un pee Jehreem pehz win-\
na Pulku/ ka peenahkahs.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un weenu Ahſi par Greh-\
ku-Uppuri/ pahri pahr to nemit-\
tejamu Dedsamu-Uppuri/ un win-\
na Dserramo-Uppuri.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un zettortâ Deenâ def-\
mits Wehrſchus/ diwi Aunus/\
tſchetrpadeſmits gadſkahrtigus\
Jehrus/ kas bes Wainas.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winnu Ehdamo-Uppu-\
rus/ un winno Dserramo-Uppu-\
purs pee Wehrſcheem/ pee Au-\
neem/ un pee Jehreem pehz win-\
na Pulku/ ka peenahkahs.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un weenu Ahſi par Greh-\
ku-Uppuri/ pahri pahr to nemit-\
tejamu Dedsamu-Uppuri/ win-\
na Ehdamo-Uppuri/ un winna\
Dserramo-Uppuri.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un peektâ Deenâ dewin-\
Wehrſchus/ diwi Aunus/tſchet-\
rpadeſmits gadſkahrtigus Jeh-\
rus/ kas bes Wainas.\n"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
